title: 2-14s14.jpg
description: Feedback control systems are central to many advanced technologies such as robotics. In this photo, Mission Specialist Steve Robinson is anchored to a foot restraint on the International Space Station's robotic arm during a spacewalk. (Courtesy of NASA.)

image_metadata.caption: Feedback control systems are central to many advanced technologies such as robotics. In this photo, Mission Specialist Steve Robinson is anchored to a foot restraint on the International Space Station's robotic arm during a spacewalk. (Courtesy of {{% resource_link "f19ab585-43ab-4bba-b34f-5a6fc692bc5e" "NASA" %}}.)
image_metadata.image-alt: Astronaut Steve Robinson in space, standing on a long robotic arm.
